# Status Update Rules

## Batch Mode

When the user selects several notes with related topics, analyze them first and then present all card suggestions together.

Suggested output:

```text
You selected {{N}} notes about "{{topic}}".

Batch plan:

| # | Source Note | Suggested Card Title | Type |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | {{note1}} | "{{assertionTitle}}" | layer |
| 2 | {{note2}} | "{{assertionTitle}}" | layer |

Confirm batch creation?
1. Confirm all
2. Confirm one by one
3. Need adjustments
```

## Update Global Status At The End

1. Read `{{metaPaths.memory}}/STATUS.md`.
2. Update the initialization migration section with remaining counts and what was processed.
3. If new `ah-card` todos were created, update the permanent notes section.
4. If new projects were created, update the projects section.
5. If all legacy notes are done, remove the initialization migration section.
6. Save the global status file.

## When Everything Is Done

Summarize:

- New permanent notes
- New literature notes
- New projects
- Archived projects
- Updated topic pages

Then tell the user the migration is complete and they can continue with `/ah`.
